Description.PT-BR: Obtenha a Vara de Pesca para começar a pescar itens e Digimon.
Description.EN-US: Obtain the Fishing Pole to start fishing for items and Digimon.

Description.PT-BR: Fale com Tai Kong Wong na Praia da Concha
Description.EN-US: Talk to Tai Kong Wong at the Shell Beach

Description.PT-BR: Ajude o Divermon no Lago dos Divermons
Description.EN-US: Help the Divermon at Divermon's Lake

Description.PT-BR: Leve os itens para Tai Kong Wong na Praia da Concha para receber a Vara de Pescar
Description.EN-US: Bring the items to Tai Kong Wong at the Shell Beach to receive the Fishing Pole
